changes: The effects of Sword Oath will not be lost upon incapacitation.
The effects of Shield Oath will not be lost upon incapacitation.
The effects of Defiance will not be lost upon incapacititation.
Presence of Mind: Recast time has been reduced from 300 to 150 seconds.
Presence of Mind: Duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Fire: Potency has been increased from 150 to 170.
Blizzard: Potency has been increased from 150 to 170.
Fire III: Potency has been increased from 220 to 240.
Blizzard III: Potency has been increased from 220 to 240.
Apocatastasis: The effect has been changed to reduce a party member's magic vulnerability by 20%.
Apocatastasis: Recast time has been increased from 120 to 180 seconds.
Manawall: Effect duration has been reduced from 60 to 20 seconds.
Bio II: MP cost has been reduced.
Aerial Slash: Casting time has been reduced from 3 to 0 seconds, making the cast instant.
Flaming Crush: Potency has been increased from 105 to 110.
Crimson Cyclone: Potency has been increased from 105 to 110.
Testudo recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Testudo effect duration increased from 8 to 12 seconds.
Enhanced Testudo recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Glory Slash potency increased from 140 to 170.
Glory Slash recast time reduced from 300 to 150 seconds.
Enhanced Glory Slash recast time reduction changed from 180 to 120 seconds.
Axe Kick recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Axe Kick effect duration reduced from 5 to 4 seconds.
Enhanced Axe Kick recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Enhanced Axe Kick II potency increase reduced from 240 to 190.
Enhanced Axe Kick III effect duration increase reduced from 9 to 6 seconds.
Somersault recast time reduced from 300 to 90 seconds.
Enhanced Somersault recast time reduction changed from 180 to 60 seconds.
Enhanced Somersault II effect duration increase reduced from 20 to 15 seconds.
Mythril Tempest potency increased from 140 to 170.
Mythril Tempest recast time reduced from 240 to 180.
Enhanced Mythril Tempest III effect duration increase reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Thrill of War recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Thrill of War effect duration increased from 15 to 20 seconds.
Enhanced Thrill of War recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Impulse Rush recast time reduced from 240 to 150 seconds.
Impulse Rush effect duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Enhanced Impulse Rush recast time reduction changed from 180 to 120 seconds.
Skewer recast time reduced from 240 to 90 seconds.
Enhanced Skewer recast time reduction changed from 150 to 60 seconds.
Enhanced Skewer II effect duration increase reduced from 20 to 15 seconds.
Manasong recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Farshot potency increased from 140 to 170.
Farshot recast time reduced from 240 to 120 seconds.
Enhanced Farshot recast time reduction changed from 150 to 90 seconds.
Enhanced Farshot II potency increase increased from 190 to 200.
Blast Shot recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Enhanced Blast Shot recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Enhanced Blast Shot II potency increase reduced from 200 to 180.
Sacred Prism potency increased from 50 to 70.
Sacred Prism recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Sacred Prism effect duration increased from 18 to 24 seconds.
Night Wing recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Enhanced Night Wing II effect duration increase reduced from 20 to 15 seconds.
Phantom Dart potency increased from 120 to 150.
Phantom Dart recast time reduced from 300 to 90 seconds.
Enhanced Phantom Dart recast time reduction changed from 180 to 60 seconds.
Enhanced Phantom Dart II effect duration increase reduced from 30 to 20 seconds.
Misty Veil range reduction changed from 10% to 20%.
Misty Veil recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Enhanced Misty Veil II effect duration increase reduced from 25 to 20 seconds.
Wither recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Aura Blast recast time reduced from 300 to 150 seconds.
Enhanced Aura Blast recast time reduction changed from 180 to 120 seconds.
Focalization made a shared class action with Conjurer and White Mage.
Focalization recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Focalization effect duration increased from 15 to 20 seconds.
Enhanced Focalization recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Full Swing recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Enhanced Full Swing recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Enhanced Full Swing II effect duration increase reduced from 25 to 20 seconds.
Enliven recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Fetter Ward recast time reduced from 240 to 150 seconds.
Fetter Ward effect duration increased from 5 to 9 seconds.
Enhanced Fetter Ward II effect duration increase changed from 10 to 12 seconds.
Weapon Throw recast time reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Enhanced Weapon Throw II effect duration increase reduced from 12 to 9 seconds.
Divine Breath HP/MP/TP restoration increased from 10% to 30%.
Enhanced Divine Breath recast time reduction changed from 180 to 240 seconds.
Mana Draw recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.
Purify recast time reduced from 240 to 180 seconds.
Purify target changed from self to selected PC.
Aetheric Burst recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Enhanced Aetheric Burst recast time reduction changed from 180 to 150 seconds.
Enhanced Aetheric Burst II effect duration increase reduced from 20 to 15 seconds.
Equanimity recast time reduced from 420 to 240 seconds.
Enhanced Equanimity recast time reduction changed from 300 to 180 seconds.
Enhanced Equanimity II effect duration increase reduced from 20 to 15 seconds.
Attunement recast time reduced from 300 to 240 seconds.

new_content.name: Hullbreaker Isle
new_content.description: New dungeon requiring an average item level of 70 or above.

new_content.name: The Tam-Tara Deepcroft (Hard)
new_content.description: New hard-mode dungeon requiring an average item level of 70 or above.
new_content.npc_location: Ul'dah - Steps of Nald (X:12 Y:8) - Paiyo Reiyo

new_content.name: The Stone Vigil (Hard)
new_content.description: New hard-mode dungeon requiring an average item level of 70 or above.

new_content.name: Syrcus Tower
new_content.description: New 24-player raid in the Crystal Tower arc.

new_content.name: The Second Coil of Bahamut (Savage)
new_content.description: A brutally difficult version of the Second Coil of Bahamut raid.

new_content.name: The Striking Tree (Hard)
new_content.description: New trial featuring Ramuh, requiring an average item level of 65 or above.

new_content.name: The Striking Tree (Extreme)
new_content.description: New extreme trial featuring Ramuh, requiring an average item level of 85 or above.

new_content.name: Frontline
new_content.description: New large-scale PvP challenge featuring three teams of 24 players.

new_content.name: The Hunt
new_content.description: An initiative offering bounties for defeating notably dangerous monsters.

new_content.name: Desynthesis
new_content.description: Crafting ability that reduces items into their constituent parts.
new_content.npc_location: Ul'dah - Steps of Thal (X:14 Y:10) - Syntgoht

new_content.name: Chocobo Raising
new_content.description: System for stabling and training chocobo companions.

new_content.name: Private Chambers
new_content.description: Personal rooms purchasable within a free company estate.

new_content.name: The Greatest Story Never Told
new_content.description: Mystery quest requiring the use of riddles and clues without journal guidance.
